name: ai-server-commander
description: Self-hosted REST/OpenAPI and remote MCP bridge for bounded AI-assisted terminal execution.

scripts.test:all: npm run test:executor && npm run test:routes && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:openapi && npm run test:docs
scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check api/terminal.js && node --check api/mcp.js && node --check api/oauth.js && node --check serverModules/auth.js && node --check serverModules/commandExecutor.js && node --check serverModules/apiRoutes.js && node --check serverModules/pluginServer.js && node --check serverModules/swaggerSetup.js

author: João Carreiro
